howItWorks.intro: This section 301 tariff calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Annual Cost
rules.formula: Cost = Import Value × Tariff Rate × Shipments
rules.explanation: Per-shipment tariff multiplied by annual frequency.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.a: Additional tariffs imposed on Chinese goods due to unfair trade practices, ranging from 7.5-25%.
Some products qualify for exclusions. Check USTR.gov for current exclusion lists.
